details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory was missing at scan time (created by this run)

no_deprecated_dirs: moltbot/ directory exists at top-level with active Python code (sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, board.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, __init__.py, agents/). This appears to be a deprecated component that should have been removed.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory contains active code referencing Moltbot patterns. Additionally, the following scripts contain Clawdbot/Moltbot references: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. Board EOD output artifacts (board/eod/out/) also contain references but are historical artifacts.
